question: How do I request a refund?
answer: Go to "My Orders", select the item you want to refund, click "Request Refund" and fill in the reason. Once approved, the refund will be returned to your original payment method within 1-3 business days. If it hasn't arrived by the due date, contact a human agent for verification.

question: How long does shipping take?
answer: Standard items ship within 48 hours. Delivery to major cities takes 3-5 days; remote areas take 5-7 days. You can track your order in real-time under "My Orders". If it exceeds the estimated time, you can request expedited handling on the order details page.

question: How do I get an invoice?
answer: Check "Request Invoice" at checkout, and fill in the billing title and tax ID. For already-placed orders, go to "My Orders" and click "Request Invoice" to issue a supplementary invoice. Electronic invoices are sent to your registered email within 24 hours; paper invoices are mailed via collect-on-delivery within 5-7 business days.

question: What if the size doesn't fit?
answer: Free size exchange within 7 days, with shipping covered by us. Go to "My Orders", click "Exchange Size", and follow the instructions to ship the item back. If the same model is out of stock, you can request a refund and place a new order.

question: How long is the warranty?
answer: All products come with a 1-year warranty. Electronics are eligible for replacement within 30 days; after 30 days, the manufacturer handles it per official policy. To request warranty service, have your order number and a description of the issue ready — the AI agent can create a ticket for you directly.
